title: Contributions by employer to accident and health plans
doc_html:
§46.2.  Contributions by employer to accident and health plans

Gross income does not include contributions by the employer to accident or health plans for compensation, through insurance or otherwise, to his employees for personal injuries or sickness.  

Added by Acts 1958, No. 242, §10.
doc_text:
§46.2.  Contributions by employer to accident and health plans
Gross income does not include contributions by the employer to accident or health plans for compensation, through insurance or otherwise, to his employees for personal injuries or sickness.
Added by Acts 1958, No. 242, §10.
